docs.text:
Manages secure workload evacuation protocols during live system moves.

Asset ID tracking code (e.g., 'DELL-R730-01').

Target datacenter destination marker.

required

Name Type Description bool bool

Source code in src/migrate.py 
def migrate_legacy_hardware_node(server_id: str, target_zone: str) -> bool:
    """Manages secure workload evacuation protocols during live system moves.

    Args:
        server_id (str): Asset ID tracking code (e.g., 'DELL-R730-01').
        target_zone (str): Target datacenter destination marker.

    Returns:
        bool: True if the node was successfully isolated and ready for de-racking.
    """
    logging.info(f"Initiating hardware isolation for legacy host: {server_id}")
    logging.info(f"Re-routing active vSAN stretched cluster communication protocols away from {server_id}")
    return True

docs.title: src.capacity_calc
docs.text: Author: Jijeesh Valappil Module: Data Center Energy Optimization & Infrastructure Balancer

docs.title: calculate_energy_savings(decommissioned_hosts)
docs.text:
Calculates datacenter environmental and maintenance cost metrics.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default decommissioned_hosts int

Total count of physical server blocks removed.

required

Returns:

Name Type Description float float

Estimated operational expenditure savings percentage.

Source code in src/capacity_calc.py 
def calculate_energy_savings(decommissioned_hosts: int) -> float:
    """Calculates datacenter environmental and maintenance cost metrics.

    Args:
        decommissioned_hosts (int): Total count of physical server blocks removed.

    Returns:
        float: Estimated operational expenditure savings percentage.
    """
    if decommissioned_hosts <= 0:
        return 0.0
    savings_ratio = decommissioned_hosts * 2.5
    logging.info(f"Consolidation metrics parsed. Estimated savings calculated at: {savings_ratio}%")
    return round(savings_ratio, 2)

docs.title: src.deploy

docs.title: provision_zero_trust_network(vpc_cidr)
docs.text:
Provisions isolated platform network boundaries with NSX-T Distributed Firewall enforcement.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default vpc_cidr str

The primary IP block schema allocation (e.g., '10.0.0.0/16').

required

Returns:

Name Type Description bool bool

True if the security boundary was successfully configured, False otherwise.

Source code in src/deploy.py 
def provision_zero_trust_network(vpc_cidr: str) -> bool:
    """Provisions isolated platform network boundaries with NSX-T Distributed Firewall enforcement.

    Args:
        vpc_cidr (str): The primary IP block schema allocation (e.g., '10.0.0.0/16').

    Returns:
        bool: True if the security boundary was successfully configured, False otherwise.
    """
    if not vpc_cidr:
        logging.warning("Execution stopped: Missing valid VPC CIDR block schema.")
        return False
    logging.info(f"Greenfield Network Security Boundary successfully deployed on CIDR: {vpc_cidr}")
    return True

docs.title: src.security_vault
docs.text: Author: Jijeesh Valappil Module: Customer Managed Encryption Key (BYOK) Controller Engine

docs.title: bind_customer_key(kms_key_id, cluster_uuid)
docs.text:
Binds a customer-managed key to an isolated cloud environment cluster.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default kms_key_id str

The unique identifier of the Key Management Service key.

required cluster_uuid str

Target infrastructure environment identifier.

required

Returns:

Name Type Description dict dict

Sync status metadata package including confirmation tokens.

Source code in src/security_vault.py 
def bind_customer_key(kms_key_id: str, cluster_uuid: str) -> dict:
    """Binds a customer-managed key to an isolated cloud environment cluster.

    Args:
        kms_key_id (str): The unique identifier of the Key Management Service key.
        cluster_uuid (str): Target infrastructure environment identifier.

    Returns:
        dict: Sync status metadata package including confirmation tokens.
    """
    logging.info(f"Initiating cryptographic handshake using KMS Key: {kms_key_id}")
    return {"status": "ENFORCED", "scope": "BYOK_COMPLIANT", "target": cluster_uuid}

docs.title: Enterprise Security Compliance Standard
docs.text: This master manual defines the platform security controls mandatory for all active software nodes inside JijeeshLab.

docs.title: Mandatory Engineering Controls
docs.text:
1. Zero-Trust Network Execution: All component micro-segments must implement default-deny policies via a distributed firewall framework.
  2. Key Rotation Rules: High-security zones must leverage customer self-managed encryption engines (BYOK structures).

docs.title: Physical Infrastructure Relocation Checklist
docs.text: This operational document outlines the hands-on verification rules when coordinating data center migrations.

docs.title: Pre-Migration Infrastructure Tasks
docs.text:
• [ ] Verify that the cross-site network transport layer has a stable path.
  • [ ] Execute a manual sanity check on local storage replication layers.
  • [ ] Label the back panel cabling layout clearly before disconnecting components.
